accepted.reason: Banded and unbanded edit-distance dynamic programming is a strong string DP optimization kernel.
Quality-score encoding and conversion loops are practical sequence-processing kernels with clean numeric/string transforms.
Taxonomy lineage assembly over tabular input has dictionary/list-heavy hot paths suitable for optimization profiling.
Local-alignment matrix fill and backtracking are high-value bioinformatics DP kernels.
Single-pass quality trimming is a concise, realistic loop optimization example for preprocessing workloads.
Collapsed Gibbs sampling for topic models provides substantial nested-loop probabilistic compute structure.
Radix arithmetic and round-function byte operations are compact cryptographic-style numeric kernels.
Collatz trajectory scanning is an integer-heavy benchmark-style loop kernel useful for baseline optimization tasks.
Recursive Fibonacci timing harness is a lightweight recursion/perf-pattern example with clear conversion opportunities.

skipped.reason: Cython language test fixture rather than a meaningful standalone compute kernel for GRPO data.
